questions.question: What biblical site do two adventurers claim they found after sneaking into Saudi Arabia, in a 1998 book titled The Gold of Exodus?
What sitcom popularized the line, "Up your nose with a rubber hose"?
What discovery in the 1840s inspired the phrase: "Go West, young man"?
What rock makes the cheapest, softest form of sandpaper?
What sport's arcane scoring system has been traced to France's 60-sou piece, which could be divided into quarters?
What spokescat warned: "Humph! Din-din. I'll eat when I'm ready"?
